title: MD
biography: R Adams Cowley was an American surgeon who pioneered the concept of the 'Golden Hour' in trauma care and founded the first dedicated shock trauma center in the world.
aiSummary: R Adams Cowley is a trauma surgery specialist at University of Maryland. Based in Baltimore.

timeline.title: Established Shock Trauma Center
timeline.description: Founded the world's first center dedicated to treating shock and trauma at the University of Maryland

timeline.title: Defined the Golden Hour
timeline.description: Established that trauma patients have the best outcomes if definitive care begins within one hour
